feature.name: Iterutils iterator toolkit
feature.description: Extract boltons iterutils chunked/windowed/remap/bucketize helpers without importing boltons.
included_behaviors: chunked and windowed iteration with size validation
bucketize grouping with key_filter and value_transform
remap tree walk with visit/enter/exit hooks
excluded_behaviors: other boltons utility modules beyond curated snapshot

entanglement.description: iterutils couples iterator adapters, nested structure remapping with path stacks, and bucketize aggregation semantics.
signals: remap maintains parent stack across enter/exit hooks
chunked_iter validates size and handles fill for last chunk
bucketize key_filter and value_transform alter grouping
get_path walks heterogeneous tree paths with defaults

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import chunked, windowed, pairwise, unique, bucketize, remap, get_path, partition; from featurelifted.iterutils import backoff, chunk_ranges
